scripts.smoke:live: bun run smoke:doctor && bun run smoke:ready && bun run smoke:local && bun run api:smoke:live
scripts.production:check: bun run predeploy:check && bun run deploy:status && bun scripts/smoke-doctor.ts --strict-production && bun run supabase:storage:check && bun run smoke:ready && bun scripts/api-smoke.ts --live --require-live-image --require-admin
scripts.qa:local: bun run secrets:check && bun run secrets:patterns:test && bun run memory:audit && bun run knowledge:audit && bun run eval:local && bun run security:audit && bun run security:audit:test && bun run api:audit && bun run api:audit:test && bun run frontend:bundle:test && bun run frontend:static:audit:test && bun run frontend:route:audit:test && bun run route-menu:audit && bun run route-menu:audit:test && bun run smoke:helpers:test && bun run provider:smoke:guards:test && bun run release:handoff:check && bun run release:handoff:test && bun run deploy:doctor:self-test && bun run deploy:readiness:test && bun run predeploy:check && bun run backend:check && bun run frontend:check && bun run smoke:doctor && bun run smoke:local && bun run api:smoke
scripts.qa:full: bun run qa:local && bun run e2e:smoke
scripts.qa:live: bun run qa:local && bun run api:smoke:live
scripts.staging:check: bun run qa:full && bun run supabase:storage:check && bun scripts/api-smoke.ts --require-admin
scripts.staging:verify: bun run predeploy:check && bun run deploy:status && bun scripts/smoke-doctor.ts --strict-staging && bun run supabase:storage:check && bun run smoke:ready && bun scripts/api-smoke.ts --require-admin
